title: urvillea ulmacea
intro: Urvillea ulmacea is a shrub-like plant native to South America, belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Urvillea ulmacea is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat colds, coughs, and other minor ailments.
